caption: A man with a tall, grey, stylized wig wears glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, and a red bow tie while speaking into a microphone in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones as he talks, with his facial expressions shifting slightly from an open-mouthed speaking position to a closed-mouth expression across the sequence. The background is a cluttered room featuring framed photos, clothing on hangers, and a mannequin torso wearing a white top. To the left of the man is a black broadcast microphone, and a second microphone stands to his right. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left reading "STALIBO PODCAST" and one on the right reading "BOSS TALK JOY" with "LIFE-CHANGING CONVERSATIONS" written in smaller text underneath. The scene remains static, with only the man's subtle head movements and facial shifts occurring as he speaks.
